#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Merge multilingual corpus at AGI ratios for tokenizer training.

Ratios: en 30%, ko 18%, code 15%, zh 15%, ja 12%, ru 10%
Each source is ~112MB, total target ~600MB with ratio sampling.
"""

import os
import sys
import time

                          'anima', 'data', 'corpus_multilingual')
